overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a surreal, dreamlike European city with melting, wax-like architecture. The environment features distorted historic buildings under bright midday sun, completely devoid of pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with surreal melted architecture and central rubble mound

events.description: character turns left around the central rubble mound to enter the narrow street

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and turning left around a rubble mound to enter a narrow street

entered.detail: historic building covered in vibrant red and yellow mural art with distorted melting facade
large pile of grey rubble and debris blocking the center of the plaza
row of European-style stone buildings with surreal melting, wax-like distortion
tall historic buildings with distorted, drooping architectural features
large domed building visible in the distant background at the end of the street
abandoned white sedan parked along the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a wide open plaza surrounded by surreal melting architecture. A colorful mural covers one building on the right while a rubble mound sits in the center. The character walks forward and turns left around the mound, leaving the plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street corridor between tall melted buildings

events.description: exits the open plaza and enters the narrow enclosed street between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow street between towering walls of melted architecture

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow corridor flanked by towering, distorted buildings with melting facades. The colorful mural and plaza elements disappear from view as the character proceeds deeper into the enclosed street, with the domed cathedral growing slightly larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep narrow corridor with consistent surreal architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady walk through the long narrow street with walls of melted stone on both sides

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the persistent narrow corridor, with the melted building walls remaining close on both sides. The environment maintains its surreal, dreamlike quality with consistent lighting and no other visible activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening approach to distant domed architecture

events.description: street widens slightly as the character approaches the distant domed buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the narrow street where the corridor opens toward the distant domed cathedral

segments.scene_description: The narrow street gradually widens as the character approaches the distant domed architecture. The melted buildings continue to line both sides but the perspective opens up, revealing more of the surreal cityscape ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, open plaza into a claustrophobic urban corridor of melting architecture. It begins in an expansive square where the character walks past a colorful mural and a central mound of rubble. As the character turns left to leave the plaza behind, the open space rapidly contracts into a narrow street flanked by towering, distorted buildings with wax-like facades. The scene then shifts from the bright openness of the square to an enclosed perspective, where the colorful mural disappears from view and a distant domed cathedral grows larger as the camera proceeds deeper into the distorted city.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a surreal urban corridor that gradually expands into a wide, distorted cityscape. It begins within a persistent narrow street, where melted building walls press closely on both sides under a bright, dreamlike light. As the character advances, the oppressive confinement of the corridor begins to give way, and the perspective slowly opens up. The scene then shifts from the tight alleyway to a broader vista, revealing more of the wax-like architecture as the camera approaches a distant domed structure.
